title: Makassar, South Sulawesi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Makassar, South Sulawesi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Makassar is a city in South Sulawesi with a population of 1,429,000. Sulawesi’s largest city and the gateway to eastern Indonesia with a bustling port and growing economy.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
